trades.reasoning: Top momentum score 95, RSI 62.7 in the bullish sweet spot, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — AI automation tailwind with clean technical structure and affordable price to deploy remaining cash.
Score 95 with RSI 61.4, MACD bullish crossover, and rising histogram momentum — strong technical setup across all three signals, deploying into an additional open slot.

decisions.briefing: Markets pulled back modestly today — NASDAQ -1.0%, S&P 500 -0.9% — consistent with routine profit-taking after the recent rally rather than a risk-off shift. The portfolio is performing well at +23.6% and we have 4 open slots with $743 cash. Deploying into PATH and AXTI, both scoring 95 with clean momentum across RSI, MACD, and SMA-20 — targeting AI automation and semiconductor exposure while technical signals remain constructive.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities dipped modestly on Friday with the S&P 500 off 0.9% and the NASDAQ down 1.0%, reflecting broad-based profit-taking after a strong multi-week recovery rather than any fundamental deterioration. The pullback was orderly and not driven by a single catalyst, suggesting investors are reducing weekend risk exposure rather than repositioning structurally. Market breadth remained constructive and the move does not indicate a trend reversal.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週五小幅回落，標普500指數跌0.9%，納斯達克指數跌1.0%，主要反映多週強勁反彈後的普遍獲利回吐，基本面並未出現明顯惡化。此次回調走勢平穩，未見單一明顯利空催化，顯示投資者在週末前主動降低風險敞口，而非策略性調倉。整體市場廣度仍具建設性，尚不構成趨勢反轉的信號。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing buys stocks with strong recent price trends, betting that winners keep winning in the short-to-medium term. Technical tools like RSI (measuring the speed of price moves) and MACD (tracking trend direction and strength) help identify stocks in the 'sweet spot' — trending up but not yet overbought. Today's picks PATH and AXTI both sit in the RSI 60–65 zone with bullish MACD crossovers, the textbook momentum entry signal.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資策略買入近期價格趨勢強勁的股票，押注強者在短中期內持續領跑。RSI（衡量價格上漲速度）和MACD（追蹤趨勢方向與強度）等技術指標有助於識別「甜蜜區」股票——趨勢向上但尚未超買。今日買入的PATH和AXTI的RSI均處於60至65區間，同時MACD金叉向上，是動量入場的標準技術信號。
